description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a padded headband and large, circular ear cups. The headphones feature a prominent boom microphone attached to one side, suggesting use for communication or gaming. The ear cups are thick and cushioned, likely providing comfort and noise isolation. Two additional small, stick-like components are visible, possibly representing detachable or modular parts such as a wireless dongle or stylus. The overall design is robust, with smooth, rounded surfaces and a utilitarian aesthetic. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some metal reinforcement and foam padding for comfort.
description: A robust pair of over-ear headphones with a boom microphone and two detachable stick-like accessories, featuring cushioned ear cups and a padded headband.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded headband, large ear cups, and attached boom microphone, with two stick-like accessories positioned nearby.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view highlighting the circular ear cup design and the full length of the boom microphone, with one accessory lying flat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the ear cups, the headband arch, and both stick-like accessories to the sides.
description_view_3: Angled rear view focusing on the back of the ear cups and the attachment point of the boom microphone, with one accessory upright.
